name: World.Inc
description: Led engineering team of frontend and smart-contract developers, establishing architecture standards and development processes. Architected scalable frontend infrastructure to handle real-time market data streams, improving system responsiveness for high-volume trading environments. Implemented core trading features including one-click trading, real-time chart updates, and high-frequency UI interactions of the centralized exchange platform.

name: EVAA Protocol
description: Engineered MVP for a TON blockchain-based lending protocol, incorporating Rust-based smart contracts for cross-chain operations with Solana. Optimized frontend and backend performance, reducing application load times by 63% through targeted code refactoring. Delivered DeFi platform features under tight deadlines during rapid development cycles and hackathon competitions.

name: Supa Doge
description: Developed smart contracts on NEAR blockchain, integrating with gaming backend systems to support interactive features. Built Solidity contracts for Ethereum interoperability, enabling cross-platform functionality. Independently designed and launched production-ready MVP frontend within three weeks.

name: AI Video Editor MVP
description: Transcript-driven rough rust based video cut engine.

name: Picture Merger
description: Rust povered codec for merging two or more pictures by pixel. Telegram bot wrapper for advanced utilisation.

name: Lightweight Live Wallpaper for Windows
description: Lightweight rust povered desktop video wallpaper engine

name: This Portfolio
description: Full-stack portfolio with SvelteKit frontend featuring 3D animations and Rust Axum backend API. Includes Three.js background effects, GSAP animations, and Tailwind CSS styling.

name: Free-Scr[ai]be
description: AI-powered tool to transcribe and translate audio recordings using React and transformer models to automate multilingual content processing.

name: Droplify
description: Dropbox-clone file storage platform with Next.js, Clerk authentication, and Drizzle ORM for secure, scalable data management.

name: SwoleFit
description: Web application to generate personalized fitness programs, integrating user data for customized recommendations.
